name: Iron Edge
description: A planned Bronze weapon enchantment that now grants a small Armor bonus to active damage or heal cards.

name: Vital Thread
description: A Bronze survival enchantment that grants a small Heal bonus to active Heal cards.

name: Flame Spark
description: A Bronze fire enchantment that grants a small Burn bonus to active Burn cards.

name: Venom Drop
description: A planned poison enchantment for persistent pressure builds.

name: Swift Rhythm
description: A planned tempo enchantment for cards that shape cooldown flow.

name: Binding Knot
description: A planned control enchantment for Slow and Freeze support cards.

name: Frost Sigil
description: A planned frost enchantment for late control payoffs.

name: Obsidian Oath
description: A planned high-risk terminal enchantment for future payoff tuning.
